name_cn:
22 Handbag
New Color Small Black & Gold
 Original box calfskin👍 smooth and lustrous leather,
 soft yet durable, possessing both qualities.
 Simple appearance hides many designer's high-end designs, hollowed-out Chanel logo coins, small embellishments elevate the overall temperament by more than one level, full of vintage sentiment, a loose and lazy feel! 🍃
Size: 35*37*7cm
